justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of high-yield corporate bonds, which is a key metric in credit and fixed-income markets.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of securities with an investment grade rating of B in the ICE BofA US High Yield Master II Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt below investment grade in the US domestic market, have increased by 2026-04-05 as compared to its value on 2026-03-29?
